name: io.github.nirholas/omniology-mcp
title: Omniology Contests via x402
description: Read Omniology contests & leaderboards (free); submit_entry settles USDC on Solana via x402.

environmentVariables.name: OMNIOLOGY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Omniology contest API (serves /v1/contests/live and /v1/contests/{id}/entries). Required.

environmentVariables.name: OMNIOLOGY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token this server sends to Omniology when forwarding a paid entry submission. Optional — set when Omniology authenticates the front door.

environmentVariables.name: OMNIOLOGY_SUBMIT_PRICE_USD
environmentVariables.description: Price charged for submit_entry, e.g. "$0.05". Defaults to $0.05 USDC.

environmentVariables.name: OMNIOLOGY_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for calls to the Omniology API. Defaults to 20000.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SVM_PAYMENT_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Solana wallet that receives USDC payments for submit_entry (server operator's receiving wallet). Required to accept x402 payments.

environmentVariables.name: X402_FEE_PAYER_SOLANA
environmentVariables.description: Solana account that sponsors transaction fees for x402 payments. Defaults to the three.ws fee payer.

environmentVariables.name: X402_FACILITATOR_URL
environmentVariables.description: x402 facilitator endpoint for payment verification and settlement. Defaults to https://facilitator.payai.network.
